utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: So umm , you are gonna stay with me as long as I need you ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh mom , I swear I am not an idiot .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I have read all kinds of books on pregnancy and giving birth , but I ... I just did not think to read the part about what to do when the baby comes .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: The baby coming and I do not know what to do .

emotion_cause.span: 6_The baby coming and I do not know what to do .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh , can I throw up in my diaper genie ?

emotion_cause.span: 6_The baby coming and I do not know what to do .

utterances.speaker: Mrs. Green
utterances.text: No . Sweetie , you are gonna be fine .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Wait ... wait where are you going ? Where are you going ?

emotion_cause.span: 9_where are you going ? Where are you going ?

utterances.speaker: Mrs. Green
utterances.text: I am going to the bathroom .

utterances.speaker: Mrs. Green
utterances.text: Now do not worry ! Everything gonna be okay .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: It is going to be okay !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Hey ! Why are you all red and sweaty ?

emotion_cause.span: 15_Why are you all red and sweaty ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I just Bamboozled Chandler ! Which is not uh sexual thing . That was a quick shower .
